title: Impact of religious cultural similarity on internal migration: a regional perspective in contemporary China

meta_data.Data_Name: AMap POI data on religious buildings
meta_data.Data_summary: Point of interest records from the AMap digital mapping platform describing religious buildings, including temples, ancestral halls, churches, and mosques, compiled at the city level and used to count religious sites by type to represent each city's religious cultural atmosphere and to construct the religious cultural similarity index between city pairs.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Data on religious buildings temples, ancestral halls, churches, and mosques are retrieved from point-of-interest POI data provided by AMap https://developer.amap.com/ Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: China > Mainland plus Hong Kong Macao Taiwan

meta_data.Data_summary: Aggregated intercity mobility indices derived from Baidu Maps location based services that infer origin and destination cities from user device stay duration and publish daily standardized indices of flows between city pairs, used to build a Migration Index proxy for intercity migrant stocks during the Spring Festival travel rush period.
meta_data.Category: Human mobility traces (GPS, transit card, ride-hailing)
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: this study constructs a Migration Index MI to proxy migration stock using Baidu migration indices http://qianxi.baidu.com Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: China > Mainland plus Hong Kong Macao Taiwan

meta_data.Data_Name: Baidu Maps API driving distance data
meta_data.Data_summary: Route based driving distance measurements between city pairs obtained via the Baidu Maps API, used as the bilateral distance variable in the gravity style migration models.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: this study measures distance using driving distances provided by the Baidu Maps API Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: medium
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: China > Mainland plus Hong Kong Macao Taiwan

meta_data.Data_Name: China City Statistical Yearbook city level indicators
meta_data.Data_summary: City level official statistics compiled in the China City Statistical Yearbook providing demographic and economic indicators such as population, GDP per capita, tertiary industry share, and average wages, used as control variables in regression models.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Economic and demographic control variables are extracted from various cities statistical yearbooks and the China City Statistical Yearbook from 2019 to 2022 Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: City statistical yearbooks of individual cities in China
meta_data.Data_summary: Locally published statistical yearbooks from individual cities containing city specific socioeconomic and demographic indicators, used alongside the national city yearbook to obtain control variables such as population, GDP per capita, industry structure, and wage measures.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Economic and demographic control variables are extracted from various cities statistical yearbooks and the China City Statistical Yearbook from 2019 to 2022 Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: medium

meta_data.Data_Name: Seventh National Population Census of China 2020 province level migrant stock data
meta_data.Data_summary: Official population census data reporting long term migrant stocks at the province level, used in robustness checks to construct an alternative migration index and a corresponding province level religious cultural similarity measure.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Our robustness checks use province-level migrant stock data from China’s Seventh National Population Census which is conducted once every 10 years Location: Methods and measures Data, Confidence: high
